sourceAmbiguity: The blueprint requires exact-once behavior but does not specify the duplicate key for repeated provider assets.
decisionTaken: Deduplicate governed objects by providerRecordingRef plus contentDigest and deduplicate DocumentReference links by callSessionRef plus providerRecordingRef.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: The provider recording ref anchors the call-session event, while the content digest proves asset identity without storing raw audio.
operationalRisk: If a provider mutates bytes under the same recording ref, a different digest will be visible as a policy breach rather than silently replacing clinical evidence.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Introduce provider asset version refs only if live provider contracts prove mutable recording refs are expected.
